description: Industry-average Meta Ads benchmarks for 2026. These are INDUSTRY AVERAGES for orientation, NOT official Meta standards or guarantees. Always prefer a per-account baseline (Adlytic's relative scoring) over a static benchmark when one exists. Currencies are as published by the source (GBP for Pengwing, USD for US averages).
disclaimer: Benchmarks drift with seasonality, geography, auction competition, and privacy/attribution changes. Treat ranges as guardrails, not targets.

fashion_apparel.label: Fashion & Apparel
fashion_apparel.notes: Strong creative-led vertical; high CTR expectation, moderate CPM, healthy ROAS. Creative refresh cadence is critical due to fast fatigue.

homewares_furniture_interiors.label: Homewares / Furniture / Interiors
homewares_furniture_interiors.notes: Higher AOV, longer consideration; lower CTR is acceptable. Lean on retargeting and considered-purchase nurture.

beauty_cosmetics.label: Beauty & Cosmetics
beauty_cosmetics.notes: Similar profile to fashion; UGC and demo video perform well.

high_aov_tech_luxury.label: High-AOV (Tech / Furniture / Luxury)
high_aov_tech_luxury.notes: Lower ROAS multiples are healthy because each order is large; judge on contribution margin, not multiple.

lead_gen_home_services.label: Lead Gen — Home Services (B2C)
lead_gen_home_services.notes: Optimise cost per QUALIFIED lead; feed CRM outcomes back via offline conversions.

lead_gen_finance_insurance.label: Lead Gen — Finance / Insurance
lead_gen_finance_insurance.notes: Higher CPL tolerated due to high deal value; lead quality dominates.

lead_gen_health_wellness.label: Lead Gen — Health / Wellness
lead_gen_health_wellness.notes: Watch policy/compliance constraints on targeting and claims.

b2b_saas.label: B2B — SaaS
b2b_saas.notes: Long sales cycle; optimise to MQL/SQL via offline events, not raw form fills.

b2b_professional_services.label: B2B — Professional Services
b2b_professional_services.notes: Account-based retargeting and content offers work best.

b2b_recruitment_hrtech.label: B2B — Recruitment / HR Tech
b2b_recruitment_hrtech.notes: Application completion rate is the key downstream gate.

seasonality.q4_holidays: CPM and CPC inflate materially (Black Friday/Cyclical peaks). Expect 20-50%+ CPM rises; plan budget and ROAS targets accordingly.
seasonality.post_holiday_jan: CPMs typically fall; efficient window for prospecting.

messaging_objective.note: Cost per messaging conversation started lacks broad public benchmarks and is region/vertical sensitive. Establish a per-account baseline and use relative deviation (Adlytic CostPerMessageEngine) rather than a fixed threshold.
